minimal.description: Portable GSD/Pi core plus workstation instruction templates.

developer.description: Daily coding stack without provider-specific marketplaces or knowledge graph tooling.

full.description: Complete opinionated workstation, including Codex autonomy, Claude tooling, Python skills, and Graphify.

core.description: Validate GSD/Pi prerequisites and provide a stable pi command.

workspace-config.description: Install global/project AGENTS.md and GSD settings templates.

compatibility-patch.description: Apply the version-gated GSD npm exports compatibility patch.

navigation.description: Install pi-lens for LSP, AST, and diagnostics workflows.

delegation.description: Install pi-subagents and pi-multi-pass delegation tooling.

review.description: Install pi-simplify, Plannotator, and wait-what review tools.

codex-safety-net.description: Install and verify the Codex destructive-command guard before enabling autonomy.

codex.description: Configure the opinionated autonomous Codex profile.

marketplace.description: Install the curated coding-workflow marketplace plugins.

claude-gsd.description: Install the pinned get-shit-done-cc layer for Claude Code.

python-skills.description: Install the hash-verified portable Python engineering skill bundle.

graphify.description: Install and register Graphify for Claude, Codex, and Pi.
